body_excerpt: In mPreference of DefaultUsbConfigurationPreferenceController.java, there is a possible way to enable file transfer mode due to a logic error in the code. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
